name: Clear screen bitmap (LDIR)
code:
ld hl,$4000
    ld (hl),0
    ld de,$4001
    ld bc,6143
    ldir

name: Set all attributes
code:
ld hl,$5800
    ld (hl),%00111000   ; white paper, black ink
    ld de,$5801
    ld bc,767
    ldir

name: Random border stripes
code:
stripes:
    ld a,r
    and 7
    out ($FE),a
    jr stripes

name: Install bold font
code:
; Embolden the ROM font into fontbuf, then point CHARS at it
    ld hl,$3D00          ; ROM character set
    ld de,fontbuf
boldloop:
    ld a,(hl)
    ld c,a
    srl a                ; copy each set pixel to the one on its right
    or c
    ld (de),a
    inc hl
    inc de
    ld a,h
    cp $40               ; stop at $4000 (768 bytes done)
    jr nz,boldloop
    ld hl,fontbuf-256    ; CHARS = font base - 256 (space is code 32)
    ld ($5C36),hl
    ret
fontbuf:
    ds 768

name: Wait for any key
code:
waitkey:
    xor a                ; scan all keyboard half-rows
    in a,($FE)
    and 31
    cp 31                ; 31 = nothing pressed
    jr z,waitkey
